name: Chocolate Angel Food Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler over boiling water, melt the chocolate chips.
2. Combine the milk, egg yolks, and sugar; gradually add to the melted chocolate, stirring constantly.
3. Cook for 2-3 minutes, then remove from the heat and allow it to cool to room temperature.
4. Fold in the whipping cream.
5. Tear the angel food cake into bite-size pieces.
6. Place half of the pieces in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
7. Top with half of the chocolate mixture.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
10. Serve chilled.
